stemHtml: The boarding of an aircraft is completed and the aircraft doors are closed. There is an unruly and disruptive passenger on board. The aircraft commander...

options.a: can ask for that person to be restrained.
options.b: can impose a fine on that person.
options.c: has to continue to the destination with all passengers on board.
options.d: does not have the right to impose any measures to such person.
